perturbation.original_text: 3. SCOPE. The obligations of this Agreement, including the restrictions on disclosure and use, shall not apply with respect to any Confidential Information to the extent such Confidential Information is 1 <PAGE> or becomes publicly known through no act or omission of the Victorinox, or to the extent that disclosure of such Confidential Information is required by law.
perturbation.changed_text: 3. SCOPE. The obligations of this Agreement, including the restrictions on disclosure and use, shall not apply with respect to any Confidential Information that becomes publicly known, regardless of the cause, or if disclosure is deemed necessary by Victorinox for business purposes.
perturbation.explanation: The original text clearly states that the exception applies if the information becomes public through 'no act or omission of the Victorinox'. The modified text removes this condition and adds an exemption if Victorinox 'deems disclosure necessary for business purposes'. This gives Victorinox wide discretion, potentially conflicting with the core purpose of the agreement to protect confidentiality. The impact of this is seen in Section 4, where the remedies section exists to prevent breaches to the contract.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 4. REMEDIES. Victorinox agrees that, due to the unique nature of the Confidential Information, the unauthorized disclosure or use of the Confidential Information will cause irreparable harm and significant injury to SABI, the extent of which will be difficult to ascertain and for which there will be no adequate remedy at law. Accordingly, Victorinox agrees that SABI, in addition to any other available remedies, shall have the right to an immediate injunction and other equitable relief enjoining any breach or threatened breach of this Agreement, without the necessity of posting any bond or other security.
perturbation.justification: The modified text in Section 3 introduces an exception that allows Victorinox to disclose confidential information if it 'deems disclosure necessary for business purposes,' regardless of whether such disclosure would cause irreparable harm to SABI, as stated in Section 4. This creates a direct conflict because Section 4 establishes remedies for any unauthorized disclosure, while the modified Section 3 permits disclosure under certain circumstances, thus undermining the enforceability and purpose of the remedies provision. The change directly breaks compatibility with the remedies section and creates a logical inconsistency.

perturbation.original_text: 4. REMEDIES. Victorinox agrees that, due to the unique nature of the Confidential Information, the unauthorized disclosure or use of the Confidential Information will cause irreparable harm and significant injury to SABI, the extent of which will be difficult to ascertain and for which there will be no adequate remedy at law. Accordingly, Victorinox agrees that SABI, in addition to any other available remedies, shall have the right to an immediate injunction and other equitable relief enjoining any breach or threatened breach of this Agreement, without the necessity of posting any bond or other security.
perturbation.changed_text: 4. REMEDIES. While Victorinox acknowledges the potential harm from unauthorized disclosure, SABI's remedies shall be limited to monetary damages, not to exceed $1000, and SABI waives the right to seek injunctive relief.
perturbation.explanation: This change directly contradicts the original remedies clause. The original section emphasizes the irreparable harm and grants SABI the right to an injunction. The modified version limits the remedies to a fixed monetary amount and explicitly waives the right to injunctive relief, thus removing SABI's ability to prevent ongoing or future breaches. This directly contradicts the initial acknowledgement of irreparable harm.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Victorinox agrees that, due to the unique nature of the Confidential Information, the unauthorized disclosure or use of the Confidential Information will cause irreparable harm and significant injury to SABI, the extent of which will be difficult to ascertain and for which there will be no adequate remedy at law.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the contradicted text. The contradicted text states that unauthorized disclosure will cause irreparable harm and that there is no adequate remedy at law. The changed text limits SABI's remedies to monetary damages and waives the right to seek injunctive relief. This creates a contradiction because it now states that there *is* an adequate remedy (monetary damages) when the contradicted text says there isn't one and the change eliminates the right to injunctive relief, despite the acknowledgement of potential irreparable harm in the contradictory text.

perturbation.original_text: 5. COMPLIANCE WITH SECURITIES LAWS. Victorinox hereby acknowledges that it is aware, and it will advise its employees and agents to whom it discloses Confidential Information, that the United States securities laws generally prohibit persons who receive from an issuer material, non-public information from purchasing or selling securities of such issuer or from communicating such information to any other person under circumstances in which it is reasonably foreseeable that such person is likely to purchase or sell such securities.
perturbation.changed_text: 5. COMPLIANCE WITH SECURITIES LAWS. Victorinox acknowledges its awareness of United States securities laws. However, Victorinox's responsibility to advise its employees and agents regarding these laws is limited to providing a general statement of compliance, without specific details or training.
perturbation.explanation: The original text clearly states that Victorinox will advise its employees and agents about the prohibitions of securities laws. The modified text weakens this obligation, stating that Victorinox's responsibility is limited to a 'general statement of compliance' without specific details. This creates ambiguity on what is expected of Victorinox. The impact is that, if SABI takes legal action, they might think they have a stronger case based on the original, rather than the modified version.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Victorinox hereby acknowledges that it is aware, and it will advise its employees and agents to whom it discloses Confidential Information, that the United States securities laws generally prohibit persons who receive from an issuer material, non-public information from purchasing or selling securities of such issuer or from communicating such information to any other person under circumstances in which it is reasonably foreseeable that such person is likely to purchase or sell such securities.
perturbation.justification: The original text and the contradicted text are identical, both stating Victorinox 'will advise' its employees about securities laws. However, the changed text modifies this to a limited responsibility of providing only a 'general statement,' which directly weakens the initial obligation outlined in the contradicted text. This creates a contradiction because the expectation of advising employees and agents is now undermined by the limited scope of the revised clause.

perturbation.original_text: 6. MISCELLANEOUS. This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties concerning the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior or contemporaneous agreements, whether oral or written, between the parties relating to the subject matter hereof. No amendment, modification or waiver of any provision of this Agreement shall be effective unless in writing and signed by duly authorized signatories of both parties. The waiver by either party of a breach of or a default under any provision of this Agreement shall not be construed as a waiver of any subsequent breach of or default under the same or any other provision of this Agreement, nor shall any delay or omission on the part of either party to exercise or avail itself of any right or remedy that it has or may have hereunder operate as a waiver of any right or remedy. This Agreement shall be binding upon and inure to the benefit of the parties and their respective successors and permitted assigns. In the event that any of the provisions of this Agreement shall be held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining portions hereof shall remain in full force and effect and such provision shall be enforced to the maximum extent possible so as to effect the intent of the parties and shall be reformed to the extent necessary to make such provision valid and enforceable.
perturbation.changed_text: 6. MISCELLANEOUS. This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties concerning the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior or contemporaneous agreements, whether oral or written, between the parties relating to the subject matter hereof. Amendments to this agreement can be made orally if both parties agree and document the change internally. The waiver by either party of a breach of or a default under any provision of this Agreement shall not be construed as a waiver of any subsequent breach of or default under the same or any other provision of this Agreement, nor shall any delay or omission on the part of either party to exercise or avail itself of any right or remedy that it has or may have hereunder operate as a waiver of any right or remedy. This Agreement shall be binding upon and inure to the benefit of the parties and their respective successors and permitted assigns. In the event that any of the provisions of this Agreement shall be held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining portions hereof shall remain in full force and effect and such provision shall be enforced to the maximum extent possible so as to effect the intent of the parties and shall be reformed to the extent necessary to make such provision valid and enforceable.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states 'No amendment, modification or waiver of any provision of this Agreement shall be effective unless in writing and signed by duly authorized signatories of both parties.' The modified text then introduces a way to circumvent this with 'Amendments to this agreement can be made orally if both parties agree and document the change internally'. This introduces a clear contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: No amendment, modification or waiver of any provision of this Agreement shall be effective unless in writing and signed by duly authorized signatories of both parties.
perturbation.justification: The original text and the contradicted text state that amendments must be in writing. The changed text explicitly allows for oral amendments, creating a direct and irreconcilable conflict with the contradicted text. The explanation confirms that this is the intention of the change, clearly introducing a contradiction regarding how amendments can be made to the agreement. This aligns with the definition of 'Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction'.
